---
title: "Dashboard"
format: dashboard
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

car_data <- mtcars |>
  rownames_to_column("car") |>
  as_tibble()
```

# Car Data Dashboard

This dashboard uses the built-in `mtcars` dataset in R. I used this dataset because it is simple, already available in R, and works well for practicing dashboard layouts.

## Row

### Number of Cars

```{r}
nrow(car_data)
```

### Average MPG

```{r}
round(mean(car_data$mpg), 1)
```

### Average Horsepower

```{r}
round(mean(car_data$hp), 1)
```

## Row

### MPG by Number of Cylinders

```{r}
car_data |>
  group_by(cyl) |>
  summarize(avg_mpg = mean(mpg), .groups = "drop") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(cyl), y = avg_mpg)) +
  geom_col() +
  labs(
    title = "Average MPG by Cylinders",
    x = "Cylinders",
    y = "Average MPG"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

### Horsepower and MPG

```{r}
car_data |>
  ggplot(aes(x = hp, y = mpg)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(
    title = "Horsepower and MPG",
    x = "Horsepower",
    y = "Miles Per Gallon"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

## Row

### Car Data Table

```{r}
car_data |>
  select(car, mpg, cyl, hp, wt) |>
  arrange(desc(mpg))
```
